# Format: <msr_hex_addr>:<cpu_num>|<hex_val> ... for every CPU ...
1b0:0|6 1|6 2|6 3|6 4|6 5|6 6|6 7|6
e2:0|1e008403 1|1e008403 2|1e008403 3|1e008403 4|1e008403 5|1e008403 6|1e008403 7|1e008403
ce:0|80839ff012200 1|80839ff012200 2|80839ff012200 3|80839ff012200 4|80839ff012200 5|80839ff012200 6|80839ff012200 7|80839ff012200
1fc:0|4004005d 1|4004005d 2|4004005d 3|4004005d 4|4004005d 5|4004005d 6|4004005d 7|4004005d
1ad:0|252525252626 1|252525252626 2|252525252626 3|252525252626 4|252525252626 5|252525252626 6|252525252626 7|252525252626
620:0|822 1|822 2|822 3|822 4|822 5|822 6|822 7|822
